main.summary: Primary operator lane for Enzo and Mission Control.

messages.author: enzo
messages.text: Mission Control Team and Office are now aligned to the real agent architecture.

business-manager.summary: Oversight lane for summaries, exception reporting, and cross-agent review.

messages.author: system
messages.text: Business Manager workspace and root-doc scaffold created.

messages.author: operator
messages.text: Give me a one-paragraph snapshot of your lane and top blockers.

messages.author: business-manager
business-manager
messages.text: Not fully live yet. The oversight lane is set up and ready, but from inside this session I do not yet have confirmed live telemetry from Mission Control or the other agents, so I’m not operating with real-time visibility yet. In plain terms: the role exists, the standards are clear, but the data feed needed to monitor execution live is still the blocker.

messages.author: operator
messages.text: can you work on building that?

messages.author: business-manager
messages.text: Yes. I’m going to map what telemetry is available now, identify the shortest path to a live oversight feed, and then I’ll give you a concrete build/update on what I can wire up from here.

data-agent.summary: Data lane for scraper health, source monitoring, and pipeline reliability.

messages.author: system
messages.text: Data Agent workspace and root-doc scaffold created.

messages.author: system
messages.text: Miami-Dade weekly path hardened; lis pendens reliability follow-up remains available for delegation.

messages.author: operator
messages.text: Give me a two-sentence health snapshot of your lane.

messages.author: data-agent
messages.text: Verified status: data lane is operational but not yet actively audited this turn, so current scraper/source health is assumed stable, not freshly confirmed. Blockers: no active incident in hand, but latest run integrity, false-success risk, and Mission Control/source truth still need a live check before I’d call the lane fully green.
